requirement_topic.en: EMC, CE-style marking expectations, and radio import flow
requirement_topic.zh: EMC、CE风格标识预期与无线产品进口流程
requirement_topic.zht: EMC、CE風格標識預期與無線產品進口流程

summary.en: Angola does not operate a single European-style EU-CE ecosystem for all imports, but relevant import channels for electronics can still require safety and interference checks plus importer-end verification. For units with Bluetooth, NFC, wireless charging, or other RF functions, INACOM-related radio compliance handling is typically expected. Mainstream power-bank compliance expectations often remain functional safety and import documentation rather than EU-marking enforcement.
summary.zh: 安哥拉没有面向全部进口品类的统一欧盟式 CE 体系，但电子产品相关入口通常仍需要安全和电磁兼容相关检查及进口商端核验。对于具备蓝牙、NFC、无线充电等射频功能的机型，通常需要按 INACOM 的无线合规流程处理。主流移动电源更多体现为功能安全和进口文件管理，而非普遍的 CE 标志强制执行。
summary.zht: 安哥拉沒有面向全部進口品類的統一歐盟式 CE 體系，但電子產品相關入口通常仍需要安全與電磁相容相關檢查及進口商端核驗。對於具備藍牙、NFC、無線充電等射頻功能的機型，通常需要按 INACOM 的無線合規流程處理。主流行動電源更多體現為功能安全和進口文件管理，而非普遍的 CE 標誌強制執行。

standards_or_laws: IANORQ technical conformity notices for electrical and consumer electronics imports
INACOM requirements for wireless and telecom-compatible imported products

summary.en: China has mandatory or sectoral certification pathways (including CCC where applicable), and domestic EMC/safety test ecosystems. These regimes are domestic in nature and do not create a direct CE-mark equivalent that automatically satisfies Angola import review. Importers still need to map technical dossiers to Angola-side inspection and customs practice.
summary.zh: 中国有 CCC 等强制或类强制认证体系以及国内 EMC 与安全测试体系，但这些体系是国内制度，不产生可直接替代安哥拉入场审核的 CE 标志同等效力。进口商仍需将技术资料映射到安哥拉侧审查与海关操作流程。
summary.zht: 中國有 CCC 等強制或類強制認證體系以及國內 EMC 與安全測試體系，但這些體系是國內制度，不產生可直接替代安哥拉入場審查的 CE 標誌同等效力。進口商仍需將技術資料映射到安哥拉側審查與海關操作流程。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 and related EMC implementation standards in China
CCC framework for applicable categories under MIIT/CNCA implementation

gap.en: Where Angola lacks an EU-style horizontal regime, say plainly: there is no broad, public EU-equivalent RoHS, no broad EU-type battery-passport framework, and no harmonised EU-style outdoor-noise regime applicable to these battery products. The practical gap is to follow Angola-specific acceptance channels and importer controls instead of importing CE assumptions.
gap.zh: 安哥拉明确缺少欧盟式横向体系：没有公开的、覆盖面等同 EU 的 RoHS 体系，没有类似欧盟电池护照的统一框架，也没有对这类锂电产品实施统一的欧盟式户外噪声制度。实践中的差距是按安哥拉特定准入渠道和进口商控制执行，而不是沿用 CE 假设。
gap.zht: 安哥拉明确缺少歐盟式橫向體系：沒有公開的、覆蓋面等同 EU 的 RoHS 體系，沒有類似歐盟電池護照的統一框架，也沒有對這類鋰電產品實施統一的歐盟式戶外噪音制度。實踐中的差距是按安哥拉特定准入渠道和進口商控制執行，而不是沿用 CE 假設。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory to comply with importer-requested EMC safety, interference, and radio-related checks where applicable through Angola workflows; no universal CE-marking law-by-law transfer from EU exists.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable Chinese domestic categories via CCC/industrial safety frameworks; not sufficient by itself for Angola market acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat CE as a China-to-EU bridge only; for Angola, focus on Angola import channels, INACOM radio handling, and importer-side verification workflows, with Portuguese records provided for local inspection.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CE 更适合用于中国-欧盟语境，安哥拉场景应聚焦于本地进口通道、INACOM 射频处理和进口商主导的核验流程，并提供葡语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CE 更適合用於中國到歐盟語境，安哥拉場景應聚焦於本地進口通道、INACOM 射頻處理和進口商主導的核驗流程，並提供葡語文件。
